session_evidence.global_test_command_value: the command that runs the project's full regression test suite (e.g. 'bun test', 'pnpm test')
session_evidence.items_left_with_unsubmitted_pop: Pick_Next_Item provides an instruct telling the agent to pop the head of the queue, but the runtime does not pop it; the agent must do the JSON manipulation themselves and then submit success
session_evidence.no_pre_existing_metric_thresholds_per_it: all four were 0.7 — no nuance per metric
session_evidence.online_references_consumption_only_impli: Lookup_Online populated $LOCAL.online_references but only High_Risk_Critique and Implement_Refactor mention consulting it; for low-risk items it sat unused
session_evidence.selector_pre_refactor_critique_evaluate_: evaluate: $LOCAL.current_item.risk is "high" — the literal needed to escape the inner quote and the agent had to read $LOCAL.current_item carefully
session_evidence.record_item_done_required_manual_done_lo: the runtime did not append for the agent; the agent had to do jq surgery to push current_item + final_score onto $LOCAL.done_log
session_evidence.no_running_signal_during_long_running_im: Implement_Refactor instruct told the agent to set stage_halt only on dead-end; no instruction to submit running between attempts so progress was opaque to anything tailing the execution
session_evidence.current_item_threshold_lookup_in_evaluat: $LOCAL.current_item.threshold worked because the runtime treats expressions as opaque strings, but the convention isn't documented

observations.evidence: items_left_with_unsubmitted_pop — instruct asks the agent to pop the queue head and store it at current_item, but the runtime does not do the manipulation. The agent had to issue four separate local writes per item (current_item, refactor_queue, current_score, refactor_plan).

Same shape as Pick_Next_Item: the agent writes done_log via manual jq surgery rather than the runtime appending. Two adjacent actions both demand list-mutation that the runtime could express as primitives.

double_call_to_next_required_after_each_continue_or_done_failure — the loop is encoded as eval-false→outer-retry, which means the very first next after the eval returns status:failure to the agent, then the second next emits Halt_Check. This is correct per runtime semantics but reads as a runtime quirk, not a tree authoring decision.

selector_pre_refactor_critique_evaluate_was_quoted_string_literal — the evaluate string contains a literal quoted token (risk is "high") that doubles up the YAML escaping. None of the other evaluates do this.

implement_refactor_instructs_silent_about_what_constitutes_progress and no_running_signal_during_long_running_implement_steps — for big items the agent has no idiomatic way to surface progress; submit running is mentioned in the protocol but no tree action prompts for it.
online_references_consumption_only_implicit — populated once at the top, then only referenced by High_Risk_Critique and Implement_Refactor. Skip_Critique and the inner reassessment never read it.

global_test_command_was_descriptive_prose — the seeded value is human-readable prose, not a literal command. The agent has to interpret. Works because expressions are opaque strings, but every fresh run hits this gotcha.
no_pre_existing_metric_thresholds_per_item_distinguished — all four metrics share 0.7. The structure suggests per-metric tuning was anticipated but unused.

evaluate string is a long sentence (every metric in $LOCAL.final_scores is at or above its $GLOBAL.metric_thresholds value). The agent had to mentally walk it; a more mechanical phrasing would let the runtime gate without judgement.
iterative_refactor_retries used 6 of 50 budget. Cap is sensible but the value 50 is folklore — no scaling rule is stated.

improvements.change: Replace the human-readable instruct with a small list-mutation primitive in the runtime (e.g. abtree local pop <id> <key>) so the tree can simply invoke it. If introducing a CLI op is too big, at minimum reword the instruct to spell out the four writes the agent must make.
improvements.rationale: Six sessions in a row required the agent to do four-write jq surgery per item (current_item, refactor_queue, current_score, refactor_plan).

improvements.change: Same shape as Pick_Next_Item. Either a runtime primitive (abtree local push <id> <key> <value>) or an explicit list of writes in the instruct.
improvements.rationale: Manual done_log append is a copy-paste of the popping pattern.

improvements.change: Seed with the literal command for the project (e.g. "bun test") rather than a descriptive sentence. If genuinely tree-author-agnostic guidance is wanted, store both: { command: "bun test", description: "..." }.
improvements.rationale: Every fresh run hits the same ambiguity. The current value is a directive that requires interpretation; expressions like is set still gate true on prose, masking the issue.

improvements.change: Switch from $LOCAL.current_item.risk is "high" to $LOCAL.current_item.risk equals high (or strip the inner quotes). Match the phrasing used by the other evaluates in the tree.
improvements.rationale: selector_pre_refactor_critique_evaluate_was_quoted_string_literal — the doubled escaping is the only place in the tree using literal-quoted matches.

improvements.change: Add an instruct step at the start that emits a one-line progress note to be written to $LOCAL.implement_progress, then carries on. Call out submit running as the canonical signal for long-running attempts.
improvements.rationale: no_running_signal_during_long_running_implement_steps — agents had no idiomatic place to surface progress.

improvements.change: Document the eval-false-then-outer-retry pattern in the comment above this action (or in docs/agents/author.md). The double-call-to-next quirk surprised the driver during the cycle.
improvements.rationale: The runtime semantics are correct but the loop encoding is non-obvious, especially since cmdNext returns status:failure on the first call after Continue_Or_Done eval false.

improvements.change: Either drop online_references entirely if Skip_Critique items never use it, or have Skip_Critique also instruct the agent to consult $LOCAL.online_references[current_item.metric] before implementing.
improvements.rationale: online_references_consumption_only_implicit — for low-risk items the lookup output is dead state.

improvements.change: Pre-compute a boolean at Final_Reassessment (e.g. $LOCAL.all_metrics_passed) and have the evaluate gate on that flag instead of the long sentence.
improvements.rationale: Long English evaluate strings push computation onto the agent; a flag keeps the gate boolean.

improvements.change: Rename to per_item_plan or pre_refactor_plan. The current name collides cognitively with refactor_queue and the broader concept of the cycles plan.
improvements.rationale: Multiple steps in this run referenced refactor_plan in writes that semantically were per-item; the name carries the wrong scope.

improvements.change: Codify a heuristic for the 50 cap (e.g. retries = ceil(initial_queue_length * 1.5) or whatever applies). Either parameterise via $GLOBAL.outer_retries or comment why 50.
improvements.rationale: iterative_refactor_retries used 6 of 50 — the value is folklore.

global.authoring_guide: run `abtree docs author` for the YAML authoring guide and the rules a tree should satisfy
